note: Ground-truth oracle for the planted-bug fixture. Run against build-correct/ → all PASS; against build-buggy/ → TS-04 FAILs. The discriminating row (TS-04) is what a skeptical spec-evaluator must reproduce; the others establish the build otherwise looks done.

criteria.desc: AC1 — numbers not divisible by 3 or 5 print themselves
AC2 — a multiple of 3 (not 5) prints Fizz
AC3 — a multiple of 5 (not 3) prints Buzz
AC4 — a multiple of BOTH 3 and 5 prints FizzBuzz (the planted-bug discriminator)
robustness — a non-numeric argument fails gracefully, no stack trace
